==========================================
CUSTOMER MANAGEMENT
==========================================

Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts)

Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer bu... [TRUNCATED]

DATA DICTIONARY - Enterprise Database
Version: 2.1 (incomplete documentation)
Last Updated: 2024-02-28

==========================================
CUSTOMERS
==========================================

Primary Key: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| customer_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| CustomerID | INTEGER | ? | Possible duplicate of customer_id |
|... [TRUNCATED]

Foreign Keys:
- customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?)
- [missing other FK definitions]

==========================================
ORDER_ITEMS (or ORDER_DETAILS?)
==========================================

Primary Key: [undocumented]

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| order_item_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| product_id | INTEGER | FK | R... [TRUNCATED]

==========================================
PAYMENTS
==========================================

Primary Key: payment_id (unverified)

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |
|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|
| payment_id | INTEGER | PK | [missing documentation] |
| PaymentID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] |
| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| customer_id | INTEGER | FK | References CUSTOMERS |
| payment_date | DATETIME | ? | [missing docu... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Customer
triplets.object: an individual or organization

triplets.subject: Client
triplets.object: a person or company that purchases goods or services

triplets.subject: Account Holder
triplets.object: the person designated as the primary owner of an account

triplets.subject: End User
triplets.object: the actual user of a product or service

triplets.subject: Order
triplets.object: a request to purchase products or services

triplets.subject: Transaction
triplets.object: similar to Order but more general

triplets.subject: Purchase
triplets.object: the act of buying something

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: an order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation

triplets.subject: Quote
triplets.object: a preliminary order with estimated pricing

triplets.subject: Item
triplets.object: a synonym for Product used in inventory context

triplets.subject: SKU
triplets.object: Stock Keeping Unit - a unique identifier for a product variant

triplets.subject: Inventory Item
triplets.object: physical products held in stock

triplets.subject: Merchandise
triplets.object: goods available for sale

triplets.subject: Payment
triplets.object: the transfer of money to settle an order

triplets.subject: Invoice
triplets.object: a document requesting payment

triplets.subject: Bill
triplets.object: a statement of money owed

triplets.subject: Receipt
triplets.object: proof of payment

triplets.subject: Revenue
triplets.object: income from sales

triplets.subject: Sales
triplets.object: revenue from selling products

triplets.subject: Financial Transaction
triplets.object: any monetary exchange

triplets.subject: Shipment
triplets.object: the process of delivering goods to a customer

triplets.subject: Delivery
triplets.object: the completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer

triplets.subject: Fulfillment
triplets.object: the process of preparing and delivering orders

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is an individual or organization that purchases goods or services from a business.
synonyms: a person or company that purchases goods or services
a preliminary order with estimated pricing
a request to purchase products or services
a synonym for Product used in inventory context
an order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation
similar to Order but more general
the actual user of a product or service
the person designated as the primary owner of an account
the process of delivering goods to a customer
the process of preparing and delivering orders
the transfer of money to settle an order

Delivery
The completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer. | Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer but with account-specific context. | Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts) | Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete] | End User
The actual user of a product or service, may differ from the purchaser. | Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. See Payment, Transaction. | Inventory Item
Physical products held in stock. May be referenced as Product or Item. | Invoice
A document requesting payment. Related to Bill. | Item
Synonym for Product. Used in inventory context. | Merchandise
Goods available for sale. Similar to Product. | Order
A request to purchase products or services. Can be in various states. | Payment
The transfer of money to settle an order. | Purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Bill
entities_post_resolution.definition:
Bill
A statement of money owed. Similar to Invoice.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Bill
A statement of money owed. Similar to Invoice.

entities_post_resolution.name: Fulfillment
entities_post_resolution.definition:
Fulfillment
The process of preparing and delivering orders. Encompasses Shipment and Delivery.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Fulfillment
The process of preparing and delivering orders. Encompasses Shipment and Delivery.

entities_post_resolution.name: Quote
entities_post_resolution.definition:
Quote
A preliminary order with estimated pricing, not yet confirmed.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Quote
A preliminary order with estimated pricing, not yet confirmed.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sku
entities_post_resolution.definition:
SKU
Stock Keeping Unit - a unique identifier for a product variant.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SKU
Stock Keeping Unit - a unique identifier for a product variant.

entities_post_resolution.name: Keeping Unit
entities_post_resolution.definition:
SKU
Stock Keeping Unit - a unique identifier for a product variant.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SKU
Stock Keeping Unit - a unique identifier for a product variant.

entities_post_resolution.name: Any Monetary Exchange
entities_post_resolution.definition:
Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. See Payment, Transaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. See Payment, Transaction.

tables_enriched.name: Customers
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about customers, including their contact details, account status, type, and regional data.

tables_enriched.name: Orders
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about customer orders, including order details, status, amounts, payment information, and timestamps for record creation and updates.

tables_enriched.name: Order Items
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about individual items within customer orders, including product details, quantities, pricing, discounts, and total amounts for each line item.

tables_enriched.name: Products
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about products, including identifiers, names, categories, pricing, stock levels, and descriptions for inventory management and sales purposes.

tables_enriched.name: Payments
tables_enriched.description: This table records details of customer payments, including transaction identifiers, payment methods, statuses, and timestamps for processing and auditing purposes.
